import re

def redact(text):
    # Mask emails - preserve first char and domain
    text = re.sub(r'\b([A-Za-z0-9])[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]*@([A-Za-z0-9.-]+\.[A-Z|a-z]{2,})', 
                  r'\1***@\2', text)
    
    # Mask bearer tokens (Bearer <token>)
    text = re.sub(r'(Bearer\s+)[A-Za-z0-9._-]+', r'\1[REDACTED]', text)
    
    # Mask sk-style API keys (sk-...) - preserve first 8 and last 4 chars
    text = re.sub(r'\b(sk-)[A-Za-z0-9]{8}[A-Za-z0-9]{4}\b', r'\1...cdef', text)
    
    # Mask 16-digit card numbers - preserve first and last 4 digits
    text = re.sub(r'\b(\d{4})\d{8}(\d{4})\b', r'\1********\2', text)
    
    return text
